rows.label: qev015005_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Nu? Are you an Earthling? What
are you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015005_SEL0021
rows.name: Brush it off with a suitable excuse.

rows.label: qev015005_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hunting-da? Gyahihihi! That is amusing-zo!
To think an Earthling, who is meant to
be hunted, is doing the hunting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015005_MSG0003
rows.name:
Fufu! I was just feeling a
little hungry-da! We will do
some hunting of our own-zo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015005_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmph, it doesn't matter either
way-zo! The boss told us to massacre
you all if we found you-da![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015005_MSG0005
rows.name:
Fufu! I was just feeling a little hungry-da!
Allow us to do some hunting of our own-zo! Put
up a little resistance and entertain us![ST:wait ]
